summary: Clean soundboard capture of an August ’81 show featuring a scorching Scarlet>Fire and rare Morning Dew, with solid playing throughout.
review: The recording is praised for its clarity—cleaner than previous tapes despite a few brief audience‑sourced gaps—making the performance easy to enjoy. Musically the concert shines with a tight first set and an especially memorable second set highlighted by Scarlet>Fire, Lost Sailor > Saint, Playing in the Band, Good Time Blues and a rare Morning Dew. Jerry, Brent and Bob receive specific praise for vocals and instrumental work.

ai_rating.rationale: Multiple detailed reviews highlight strong musical performance and mostly excellent soundboard quality; only minor recording gaps are noted, resulting in a high overall rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Generally clean and crisp SBD tape; a few minutes of audience recording (early Stranger, later Morning Dew) introduce lower‑fidelity sections but do not detract from overall listenability.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Respectable first set followed by an interesting, song‑rich second set with rare treats; tight playing and strong vocals keep the momentum high throughout.

band_member_comments.Jerry: In good form for August ’81; solid vocals on Candyman, Loser and generally energetic guitar work.
band_member_comments.Bob: Recovered vocal strength after a shaky previous night; contributes well‑rounded vocals.
band_member_comments.Keys: Brent (keyboards) rips it up—great organ work and strong backing/vocal support.
